posts.author: Eline (Eline)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone, i’m new here and hope someone can help me.

I have a board for a product development proces where every person has a role. (concept > product development > testing). In the parent item we have listed who works on the product and what each ones role is. In the subitems the steps in de proces are defined, which are always sequential tasks. Is there a way that we only need to fill in the people columns of the parent item and than automatically the people column for the subitems is filled in, based on the role?

image957×600 82.7 KB

So for example if person X is assigned in the parent item on role O1, that an automation/formula assigns person X also on the subitems with that role (now I’ve made a textcolumn in the subitems, but that may also be a statuscolumn if necessary).

I already asked Fantasy Media from the Subitems automations app but they don’t have a solution.

Any ideas?

posts.author: workflowboost (Bartosz @ Workflow Boost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Eline

It’s possible with our Subitems Pro Automations app.

To achieve that you’d need to set up a following automation for each role:

image346×265 8.67 KB

Here is a demo for O1 and O2 roles:

I hope you find it helpful! If you have any questions or requests for custom automations, feel free to reach out to us!

posts.author: Eline (Eline)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Workflow Boost,

Thanks for your answer! That is exactly what I need
